summary: Fans are angry that the matrix recording has been removed from Archive.org and cannot be streamed or downloaded.
review: Both reviewers express strong frustration over the removal of this 1990 show from the Archive, criticizing Rhino's handling of the release and noting they can only obtain the soundboard elsewhere. No comments were made about the musical performance or audio fidelity of the recording itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews, both focusing on availability issues and giving the lowest possible ratings; no information about show or sound quality to adjust the score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers complain that the matrix recording has been taken down and is not available for streaming or download; no direct comments on audio clarity or mix.
